prompt: Approved isolation node facing open: choose response.
why_v1: Facing one open, raising isolates weaker continues better than flat-calling when the hand is strong enough to fight back now.
feedback_acceptable_v1: Acceptable. Calling keeps the hand in play, but raising wins more here by isolating weaker continues right away.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Raising here isolates weaker ranges and applies pressure better than a flat call.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. This pressure spot fights back best with a raise, which isolates and pressures weaker ranges better than a flat call.
